metadata.title: Create account | Slashie
metadata.description: Create a Slashie account to post tasks, compare quotes, or become a local worker.

en.asideTitle: Create an account for local tasks and quotes.
en.asideDescription: Post tasks, compare quotes from nearby workers, or set up your worker profile to find local work.
en.workerText: Find nearby tasks and send quotes
en.title: Create your account
en.description: One account for posting tasks, comparing quotes, and earning as a worker.

metadata.title: 建立帳戶 | Slashie
metadata.description: 建立 Slashie 帳戶，發佈任務、比較報價，或成為本地 worker。

zh_hk.asideTitle: 為本地任務和報價建立帳戶。
zh_hk.asideDescription: 發佈任務、比較附近 worker 的報價，或設定 worker 個人檔案尋找本地工作。
zh_hk.workerText: 尋找附近任務並傳送報價
zh_hk.title: 建立你的帳戶
zh_hk.description: 一個帳戶即可發佈任務、比較報價，並以 worker 身份賺取收入。
